items.title: Start from the job, not the hype
items.avoid: Adopting Claude because competitors mention AI, without a defined workflow.
items.prefer: Write the user story: input, desired output, reviewer, success metric.
items.why: Clear jobs reveal whether language AI helps or a spreadsheet suffices.
items.example: Job: "Turn 1-hour interviews into 10 bullet themes within 30 minutes" vs vague "use AI more."

items.title: Keep humans on the hook for external impact
items.avoid: Auto-sending Claude drafts to customers or publishing without review.
items.prefer: Draft → human edit → send/publish; log prompts and outputs for support QA.
items.why: Use cases fail publicly when unchecked hallucinations reach users.
items.example: Support agent clicks "Apply suggestion" after reading, not auto-post.

items.title: Ground enterprise answers
items.avoid: Relying on base model memory for company-specific policy.
items.prefer: Paste excerpts, use Projects/files, or RAG via API with citations.
items.why: Use-case accuracy scales with supplied context.
items.example: Attach the 2024 PTO policy PDF when answering HR questions.
